positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene featuring bioluminescent glowing flora and massive, root-woven crystal structures. The composition should be highly graphic and centrally balanced, suitable for apparel prints. Use deep indigo and midnight blue contrasted sharply with vibrant emerald green and gold accents. Lighting should be soft, ethereal 'glow' effects, emphasizing crisp edges and clean silhouettes. The style must be a mix of detailed etching work and modern, flat vector art, giving it a high contrast, mystical, yet wearable feel. Include stylized constellations subtly integrated into the roots.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, copyright, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, low detail, dirty, jpeg artifacts
